top_comment.author: Ben Livengood
top_comment.text:
Contains/element-of are the complementary formal verbs from set theory, but I've definitely seen Contains/is-a used as equivalent in practice (cats contains Garfield because Garfield is a cat).

Similarly in programming "cat is Garfield's type" makes sense although it's verbose, or "cat is implemented by Garfield" for the traits folks which is far more natural.

So where linguistically necessary humans have had no trouble complementing is-a in natural language. I think it's a matter of where emphasis is desired; usually the subject (Garfield) is where the emphasis is, and usually the element is the subject instead of the class. Formally we often want the class/set/type to be the subject since it's the thing we are emphasizing.
top_comment.claim: The comment's point: I think it's a matter of where emphasis is desired; usually the subject (Garfield) is where the emphasis is, and usually the element is the subject instead of the class.

The main claim is: How could the values be modified in a specific direction, or to a specific state, so that that the modified agent has some specific effect on the world?

top_comment.author: baturinsky
top_comment.text: I think AI should threat value function as probabilistic.  I.e. instead of thinking "this world has value of exactly N" it could think something like "I 90% sure that this world has value N+-M, but there is 10% possibility that it could actuall have value -ALOT". And would avoid that world, because it would give a very low expected value on averager.
top_comment.claim: The comment's point: I think AI should threat value function as probabilistic.

top_comment.author: Jacob Pfau
top_comment.text: Why is this supposed to be true? Intuitively, this seems to clash with the authors view that anthropic reasoning is likely to be problematic. From another angle, I expect performance gain from situational awareness to increase as dataset cleaning/curation increases. Dataset cleaning has increased in stringency over time.  As a simple example, see my post on dataset deduplication and situational awareness.
top_comment.claim: The comment's point: From another angle, I expect performance gain from situational awareness to increase as dataset cleaning/curation increases.
